mapper.insert: insert into video_detection_task (video_id, model_type, confidence_threshold, detect_classes, frame_interval, priority, status, progress, create_user_id) values (#{videoId}, #{modelType}, #{confidenceThreshold}, #{detectClasses}, #{frameInterval}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{createUserId})
mapper.select: select count(*) from video_detection_task where video_id = #{videoId}
mapper.update: update video_detection_task set progress = #{progress}, processed_frames = #{processedFrames}, detection_count = #{detectionCount}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}

update video_detection_task set status = #{status}, total_frames = #{totalFrames}, processed_frames = #{processedFrames}, detection_count = #{detectionCount}, result_summary = #{resultSummary}, end_time = now(), progress = 100 where id = #{id}
